content.fact_text: Implementation of the Health and Observability Module providing HTTP health probes and OpenTelemetry tracing for the reconciliation lifecycle.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides health status monitoring for DB, Redis, and Kafka, and initializes OpenTelemetry tracing. Employs circuit breaking for health checks and supports graceful shutdown.
provenance_data.utility: Provides essential health monitoring for infrastructure dependencies and distributed tracing support via OpenTelemetry for the reconciliation service.
